content: SQLite migrations for CLI tools: PRAGMA user_version + ordered numbered migration scripts run in transactions on open is the standard lightweight pattern (~30 lines, no Alembic needed for per-case DBs). Each migration bumps user_version; skip if current >= N. Caveat for sqlite-vec: vec0 virtual tables can't be ALTERed like normal tables and dimension is fixed in DDL, so vector-table changes are drop-and-rebuild (re-embed) migrations; per-case DBs make destructive migration acceptable (re-ingest is idempotent).
